blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Navigated to Logs Drilldown
- Searched for and filtered specific logs you want to investigate
- Learned how to drill down into a log and investigate related logs
- Added a log visualization to a dashboard

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Configure value mappings](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/panels-visualizations/configure-value-mappings/)
- [Visualizations](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/panels-visualizations/visualizations/)
- [Configure field overrides](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/panels-visualizations/configure-overrides/)
- [Configure thresholds](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/panels-visualizations/configure-thresholds/)
- [Configure standard options](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/panels-visualizations/configure-standard-options/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Visualize logs in a Grafana Cloud dashboard](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/visualization-logs/)
